languages.text: {n}Пробравшись внутрь при помощи лаз-резаков, разведывательная команда обнаруживает скелет единственного пилота. Судя по повреждениям, он умер задолго до крушения.{/n}
{n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пробравшись внутрь при помощи лаз-резаков, разведывательная команда обнаруживает скелет единственного пилота. Судя по повреждениям, он умер задолго до крушения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance team discovers the skeleton of the sole pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}
{n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

{n}After breaching the hull with las-cutters, the reconnaissance team discovers the skeleton of the sole pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash, either from starvation or suffocation. {/n}
{n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance team discovers the skeleton of the sole pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}
{n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

languages.text: {n}レーザーカッターで船体を開けた偵察隊は、唯一のパイロットの骨を発見した。彼の怪我から判断すると、彼は墜落するずっと前に、飢えや窒息で死んでいた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with las-cutters, the reconnaissance team discovers the skeleton of the sole pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash, either from starvation or suffocation. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Lazer kesicilerle gövdeyi yaran keşif kuvveti, mekikteki tek pilotun iskeletini keşfediyor. Yaralarına bakılırsa kazadan çok önce ölmüş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lazer kesicilerle gövdeyi yaran keşif kuvveti, mekikteki tek pilotun iskeletini keşfediyor. Yaralarına bakılırsa kazadan çok önce ölmüş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}侦察队用激光切割器破开船体后，发现了那名孤身飞行员的遗骸。从伤势来看，他早在坠毁之前就已死去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}侦察队用激光切割器破开船体后，发现了那名孤身飞行员的遗骸。从伤势来看，他早在坠毁之前就已死去。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nachdem das Team den Rumpf des Shuttles mit Lasercuttern geöffnet hat, entdeckt es das Skelett des Piloten. Seinen Verletzungen nach starb er bereits lange vor dem Absturz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem das Team den Rumpf des Shuttles mit Lasercuttern geöffnet hat, entdeckt es das Skelett des Piloten. Seinen Verletzungen nach starb er bereits lange vor dem Absturz.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Après avoir percé la coque à l'aide de découpeurs laser, l'équipe de reconnaissance fouille la navette et y découvre le squelette d'un pilote. Si l'on en croit les marques sur sa dépouille, il est mort bien avant l'accident.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Après avoir percé la coque à l'aide de découpeurs laser, l'équipe de reconnaissance fouille la navette et y découvre le squelette d'un pilote. Si l'on en croit les marques sur sa dépouille, il est mort bien avant l'accident.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras atravesar el casco con cortadoras láser, la unidad de reconocimiento encuentra el esqueleto del piloto solitario. A juzgar por las heridas, murió mucho antes del impacto.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After breaching the hull with lascutters, the reconnaissance force discovers the skeleton of the lone pilot. Judging by his injuries, he died long before the crash.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras atravesar el casco con cortadoras láser, la unidad de reconocimiento encuentra el esqueleto del piloto solitario. A juzgar por las heridas, murió mucho antes del impacto.{/n}
